sections.paragraph:
fut. יִסְפֹּן prop. to cover (comp. the kindred roots צָפַן, שָׂפַן). Hence-

(1) to cover, as with beams or rafters; followed by two acc., 1Ki 6:9 7:3 .

(2) to floor, to cover with boards, 1Ki 7:7 Jer 22:14 Hag 1:4.

(3) to hide, to preserve. Deu 33:21, וַיַּרְא בִּי־שָׁם הֶלְקַת מְחֹקֵק סָפוּן “and he saw a portion assigned by the law-giver there preserved,” (סָפוּן agrees in gender not with חֶלְקָה to which it refers, but with the nearer word מְחֹקֵק, comp. 1Sa 2:4 Lehrg. p. 721).

Derived nouns סִפּוּן, סְפִינָה.
